name: codex-image-editor
description: A focused Codex workspace for marking any image and launching native Image Gen edits.

interface.shortDescription: Mark any image and launch native Image Gen.
interface.longDescription: Codex Image Editor embeds a focused Zone, Request, and Send workflow in the Codex conversation. Draw or select a region on any image, describe the intended change, add optional references, then send an exact handoff to Codex native Image Gen. Advanced precision and review controls stay available on demand. Workflow state remains local and the plugin never calls an external image API.
defaultPrompt: Use the inline Image Editor for this image.
Prepare a precise Image Gen edit from the image in this thread.
Save this Codex Image Gen result as a reviewed version.
